notes.spacingSource: Figma query returned empty auto-layout spacing. Used standard 4px-base scale (4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64px) per design convention.
notes.radiusSource: Extracted 14 unique radius values from Figma: 1.5, 3, 4, 6, 8, 10, 10.5, 12, 16, 17, 18, 20, 24, 35px. Consolidated into 8-value scale with semantic aliases.
notes.radiusMatching: Matched extracted values to design-system-context.json: cardRadius=16px, buttonRadius=8px, inputRadius=8px, badgeRadius=6px, pillRadius=35px
